log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):1+1=2 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Cult Fanatic awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Cult Fanatic.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Cult Fanatic awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Cult Fanatic.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Mage --- HP: 40/40 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Cult Fanatic (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Cult Fanatic.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20:2+1=3 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 28/33
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Mage awake.
ACTION: Shakes Mage awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Not in melee. Sacred Flame + approaching.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank.
→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:16+7=23 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 28/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Not in melee. Sacred Flame + approaching.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank.
→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:3+7=10 vs DC 11] FAIL! 3 radiant damage. HP: 56/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Not in melee. Sacred Flame + approaching.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank.
→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:17+7=24 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Yuan-Ti — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
